Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface RuleApp

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
All Known Subinterfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractContractRuleApp, AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp, BlockContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp, BlockContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp, CloseAfterMergeRuleBuiltInRuleApp, ContractRuleApp, DefaultBuiltInRuleApp, JmlAssertBuiltInRuleApp, LoopApplyHeadBuiltInRuleApp, LoopContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp, LoopContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp, LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp, MergeRuleBuiltInRuleApp, NoPosTacletApp, OneStepSimplifierRuleApp, PosTacletApp, SMTRuleApp, TacletApp, UseDependencyContractApp
public interface RuleApp extends EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
rule application with specific information how and where the rule has to be applied

    returns the PositionInOccurrence (representing a SequentFormula and a position in the corresponding formula) of this rule application

  • Method Details

    • rule

      Rule rule()
      returns the rule of this rule application

    • posInOccurrence

      PosInOccurrence posInOccurrence()
      returns the PositionInOccurrence (representing a SequentFormula and a position in the corresponding formula) of this rule application

    • execute

      @Nullable ImmutableList<Goal> execute(Goal goal, Services services)
      applies the specified rule at the specified position if all schema variables have been instantiated
      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal where to apply the rule
      services - the Services encapsulating all java information
      Returns:
      list of new created goals

    • complete

      boolean complete()
      returns true if all variables are instantiated
      Returns:
      true if all variables are instantiated

    • displayName

      default String displayName()
      Returns:
      user-friendly name for this rule-application
